prompt: A richly detailed miniature-diorama style illustration of a busy Venetian canal street in warm afternoon light, designed like a whimsical “find the hidden duck” scene. Show a narrow turquoise canal running through the center with 4 black gondolas, each with striped-shirt gondoliers and tiny tourists, crossed by 1 ornate white stone footbridge crowded with people. Fill the scene with dozens of cute chibi travelers and shopkeepers in a handcrafted toy-like style, with oversized heads, soft expressive faces, textured clothing, and highly detailed props. Surround the canal with colorful old Venice buildings in peach, terracotta, cream, and yellow stucco, red tile roofs, green shutters, balconies, flower boxes, laundry lines, lanterns, and narrow shopfronts. Include 6 clearly readable shop or sign texts placed naturally in the environment: “TRATTORIA,” “MASCHERE,” “CALLE DEI COLORI,” “CAFFE LAGUNA,” “VENEZIA,” “FIORI,” plus a small chalkboard sign reading “GONDOLA SERENATA.” On the right, feature a Venetian mask shop overflowing with ornate masks and carnival decorations; on the left, a trattoria with outdoor diners; in the lower left, a small café kiosk; in the lower center, a postcard stand labeled VENEZIA; in the lower right, a flower cart labeled FIORI; near the center bottom, an artist painting at an easel and a street musician with a guitar. Scatter luggage, tables, pastries, postcards, flower pots, market goods, and canal posts throughout the cobblestone street to create a dense travel-market atmosphere. Add a decorative framed game sign in the upper-right corner with a tiny duck icon and the text Find the duck!. Hide exactly 1 tiny yellow rubber duck subtly among the lower-left luggage area near the café so it is visible but easy to miss. Use a high-angle isometric composition, storybook travel-poster charm, ultra-detailed handcrafted textures, vibrant colors, cozy European ambiance, and a playful seek-and-find aesthetic.
